tax_note: Company tax 25%; GST registration required above $75K revenue; ABN required

vat_gst.name: GST
vat_gst.registration_threshold_note: Mandatory above threshold; voluntary registration available below
vat_gst.digital_products: GST applies to digital products sold to Australian consumers. Non-resident sellers must register for GST if Australian sales exceed $75K.

digital_product_tax: Digital products are subject to GST at 10%. If you sell to overseas customers, exports are generally GST-free. Keep records of customer location for compliance.

entity_comparison.best_for: Testing a business idea with minimal overhead

entity_comparison.tax_treatment: Company tax 25% for base rate entities; dividends taxed personally with franking credits
entity_comparison.best_for: Serious businesses; revenue above $80K/year; seeking investors or contracts

entity_comparison.liability: Joint and several — each partner liable for all debts
entity_comparison.tax_treatment: Income flows through to individual partners at personal rates
entity_comparison.best_for: Two or more people testing a joint venture
